emails.subject: RE: Next visit to Houston
emails.body: George, Would you like to take a like at the service (see below). The meeting is on July 12 at 2:30 (19th floor). Vince Forwarded by Vince J Kaminski/HOU/ECT on 06/29/2000 04:08 PM "Edward Krapels" <ekrapels@esaibos.com> on 06/29/2000 03:53:40 PM Please respond to <ekrapels@esaibos.com>
